Name: Momentum Skort
Description: Momentum Skort combines versatile layering capability with confident, on-the-move design. Crafted from lightweight fleece, it transitions seamlessly from gym sessions to casual outings—wear it solo or layer it over your favorite base. The curved front seam flatters your silhouette while the wrap-over side split offers unrestricted movement and a modern aesthetic. Mesh undershorts provide breathable coverage and support, eliminating the need for additional layers underneath. Reinforced elastic binding ensures lasting durability through countless washes and workouts. Whether you're powering through cardio, heading to brunch, or running errands, this skort adapts to your lifestyle with understated sophistication and functional design that keeps pace with your ambitions.

Whether you're navigating city streets or exploring the outdoors, this jacket adapts to your pace and keeps you moving with confidence.

This longline essential features a concealed zipper hidden beneath a snap placket for a streamlined silhouette, paired with an oversized kangaroo pocket that keeps your essentials within easy reach. Strategic hidden pockets throughout provide secure storage without disrupting the clean aesthetic, while innovative stretch gussets offer unrestricted movement whether you're navigating crowded transit or tackling your daily commute. Crafted from a premium stretch woven outer, this anorak moves with you, adapting to your body's natural motion. The soft mesh lining ensures breathability and comfort during active wear, while the adjustable toggled hem lets you customize the fit to your preference. Whether layered over basics or worn as a standalone piece, the Shift Anorak delivers versatile coverage that transitions seamlessly from commute to casual outings. Built for those who value intelligent design and practical elegance.

Name: Shift Crewneck

Name: Shift Dress
Description: Elevate your everyday wardrobe with this sophisticated Shift Dress, engineered for both style and performance. Crafted from advanced moisture-wicking fabric, it keeps you comfortable and fresh throughout your day while maintaining a polished, refined appearance. The thoughtfully designed cap sleeves provide flattering coverage, while the paneled front creates a streamlined silhouette that flatters every figure. The A-line hem hits just above the knee, striking the perfect balance between professional and approachable. Whether you're heading to the office, running errands, or meeting friends for lunch, this versatile tech dress transitions effortlessly from one occasion to the next. Experience the confidence that comes from looking impeccable while feeling completely at ease.

Name: Shift Legging
Description: Shift Legging Experience versatile comfort with our Shift Legging, engineered for athletes and active individuals who demand performance without compromise. Crafted from lightweight fleece, this legging transitions seamlessly from layering piece to standalone essential, adapting to your workout intensity and seasonal needs. The thoughtfully designed power waistband provides secure support during dynamic movement, while strategically placed mesh calf panels enhance breathability exactly where you need it most. Whether you're hitting the gym, running errands, or pushing through outdoor training sessions, the Shift Legging moves with you—offering the perfect balance of coverage, comfort, and performance that keeps up with your active lifestyle.

Name: Shift Quarter-Zip
Description: Shift Quarter-Zip delivers the performance edge you need for active days. Advanced anti-odor technology neutralizes sweat and odor, keeping you feeling fresh from morning workouts to evening commutes. This versatile pullover combines style with function—the offset half zip provides easy ventilation control, while bonded seams ensure durability through countless washes. Strategically placed mesh side inserts enhance breathability during intense activity, preventing that uncomfortable heat buildup. The slim fit flatters your frame without restricting movement, and the extended drop hem offers modern coverage that works whether you're layering or wearing solo. Whether you're hitting the gym, running errands, or transitioning between seasons, the Shift Quarter-Zip adapts to your lifestyle with understated sophistication and reliable performance.

Name: Shift Track Pant
Description: Experience the perfect blend of style and functionality with the Shift Track Pant, engineered for those who demand performance without compromise. Advanced anti-odor technology keeps you feeling fresh throughout your day, whether you're commuting, training, or transitioning between activities. Versatile enough for the gym, the office, or weekend adventures—this is the track pant that adapts to your lifestyle.

Name: Shift Zip Jacket
Description: The Shift Zip Jacket combines performance and style for the modern lifestyle. Engineered with moisture-wicking fabric, this jacket keeps you dry and comfortable throughout your day, whether you're commuting, working, or staying active. The refined tailoring delivers a polished look that transitions seamlessly from office to weekend. Thoughtfully designed with panel construction, a full zip front for easy layering, and a curved back yoke that moves with your body, this jacket offers both comfort and flattering fit. The innovative thumbhole sleeves provide extra coverage and warmth without bulk, while the DWR-treated knit resists moisture and maintains its shape. Finished with a soft-touch lining that feels luxurious against your skin, the Shift Zip Jacket is the versatile piece you'll reach for again and again.

Name: Stride Anorak
Description: The Stride Anorak redefines versatile layering with performance-driven design that transitions seamlessly from gym to street. Engineered with quick-dry fabric and a precisely tailored silhouette, this athleisure pullover shell keeps you moving without compromise. Dual-entry front pockets provide secure storage for essentials, while strategically placed laser-cut underarm vents deliver targeted breathability during active pursuits. The innovative side zipper ensures effortless entry and exit, eliminating the awkward pull-over struggle. When adventure calls elsewhere, simply pack the entire jacket into its own integrated pocket—making it the ultimate travel companion for those who refuse to sacrifice style or functionality. Whether you're navigating urban commutes or weekend getaways, the Stride Anorak adapts to your lifestyle with intelligent engineering and modern aesthetics.

Name: Stride Crewneck

This is the crewneck that earns its place in your rotation—reliable, comfortable, and genuinely wearable day after day.

Name: Stride Crewneck
Description: Lightweight fleece perfect for layering or solo wear. Classic crew with drop shoulder, tonal embroidered logo, and split hem. Brushed fleece fabric for easy wear. Whether you're building a versatile wardrobe or seeking that one piece that does it all, the Stride Crewneck delivers on both fronts. The thoughtfully designed drop shoulder creates a flattering, modern silhouette that works for everyone, while the brushed fleece feels incredibly soft against your skin without the weight that slows you down. Layer it over a tee for effortless depth, or wear it solo when you want comfort without compromise. The split hem adds just enough edge to keep things interesting, and the tonal embroidered logo gives you subtle style credentials. This is the crewneck that earns its place in your rotation—reliable, comfortable, and genuinely wearable day after day.

Name: Stride Tee
Description: Sculpted fit and breathable knit ideal for all-day movement. Technical jersey tee with stitched side gussets, reinforced neckline, and subtle curved hem engineered for multi-direction stretch. The precision-constructed side panels eliminate excess fabric while maintaining freedom of motion, making this essential for active lifestyles. Reinforced stitching at high-stress areas ensures durability through repeated wear and washing. The curved hem prevents rolling and bunching, while the advanced knit fabric wicks moisture and regulates temperature. Whether layered or worn solo, the Stride Tee adapts to your body's demands without compromise.

Name: Studio Cardigan
Description: Elevate your everyday wardrobe with the Studio Cardigan, a thoughtfully engineered piece that seamlessly transitions from office to weekend. This longline silhouette features a wrinkle-resistant finish that maintains its polished appearance throughout the day, while the lightweight rib knit construction provides comfortable stretch and breathability. The straight cut design flatters various body types, and practical patch pockets offer functional storage without compromising the clean aesthetic. Side slits enhance mobility and create subtle visual interest, while the open front allows for versatile layering over dresses, tees, or tanks. Performance-driven details ensure this cardigan withstands regular wear while maintaining its structured shape, making it an investment piece that works harder than traditional knitwear.

Name: Studio Chino Pant
Description: Hidden pockets and stretch gussets make this a commuter's favorite. Relaxed chino pant with tapered leg, back welt pockets, and elasticated rear waistband. Made from wrinkle-resistant stretch cotton blend. The thoughtful design balances comfort with polished style, featuring a mid-rise fit that works seamlessly from office to weekend. Functional details like the reinforced gusset construction enhance mobility during your commute, while the premium fabric resists creasing throughout the day. Whether you're navigating transit or transitioning between meetings, this versatile pant delivers the durability and ease you need without compromising on refined aesthetics.

Name: Studio Hoodie
Description: Designed for versatility from studio sessions to office setups, this Studio Hoodie seamlessly transitions between creative work and professional environments. The relaxed fit provides comfortable movement without sacrificing a polished appearance, while the structured three-panel hood offers superior coverage and a refined silhouette. An extended back hem ensures optimal length whether you're seated at a desk or standing in the studio, and the oversized kangaroo pocket delivers practical storage for essentials. Finished with a woven logo label detail that adds understated sophistication, this hoodie combines functional design with thoughtful construction for those who demand both performance and style in their everyday wear.

Name: Studio Jogger
Description: Soft performance knit designed to transition seamlessly from workout to weekend wear. This expertly crafted jogger features an easy, comfortable fit that accommodates movement without excess bulk. Front patch pockets provide practical storage for essentials, while the encased drawstring waist allows for personalized fit adjustment. The elasticated ankle hem creates a refined silhouette and prevents fabric from riding up during activity. Constructed from soft brushed jersey throughout, the fabric delivers a luxurious feel against skin while maintaining the durability needed for both athletic pursuits and casual everyday wear. The balanced weight and breathable composition make these joggers equally suited for gym sessions, outdoor activities, or relaxed social settings. A versatile staple that bridges the gap between performance and lifestyle.

Name: Studio Legging
Description: Studio Legging combines performance and comfort with thoughtfully engineered construction. The quick-dry fabric ensures moisture management during active pursuits, while flatlock outer seams eliminate chafing and provide a refined silhouette. A wide waistband distributes pressure evenly for all-day wear without restriction, and the slight crop length offers modern versatility—equally at home in the studio or transitioning to casual settings. The soft ribbed knit delivers medium compression that supports without constraining, promoting circulation during movement while maintaining a relaxed aesthetic. Tailored edges provide clean lines and durability through repeated wear and washing. Whether you're flowing through a yoga session, running errands, or unwinding at home, this legging adapts to your lifestyle with understated sophistication and functional design.

A wide waistband distributes pressure evenly for all-day wear without restriction, and the slight crop length offers modern versatility—equally at home in the studio or transitioning to casual settings. The soft ribbed knit delivers medium compression that supports without constraining, promoting circulation during movement while maintaining a relaxed aesthetic. Tailored edges provide clean lines and durability through repeated wear and washing. Whether you're flowing through a yoga session, running errands, or unwinding at home, this legging adapts to your lifestyle with understated sophistication and functional design.

Name: Studio Quarter-Zip
Description:
Anti-odor tech keeps you fresh on the move all the time.

The Studio Quarter-Zip combines performance innovation with refined comfort for the modern active lifestyle. Advanced anti-odor technology neutralizes odors throughout the day, keeping you feeling fresh whether you're commuting, training, or relaxing. The thoughtfully designed silhouette features a half-zip closure for easy layering and temperature control, while dolman sleeves provide unrestricted movement and a contemporary aesthetic. A subtle drop shoulder creates a relaxed fit that flatters various body types, and the brushed interior delivers a soft, cozy feel against your skin. The structured rib collar maintains its shape through repeated wear and washing. Versatile enough to transition seamlessly from gym to street, this pullover is an essential piece for anyone seeking functional style without compromise.


Cozy pullover with rib collar, half zip, and dolman sleeve construction. Slight drop shoulder and brushed interior for added comfort.

Name: Stride Runner
Description:
Feel the ground beneath your feet glide along like a breeze with the Stride Runner, a road warrior built for racking up the everyday miles.

Constructed from sustainably-sourced, animal-free materials, this shoe features a low drop with moderate cushioning to allow you to feel the road without getting beat up by it. Reinforced laces provide ample support while an antimicrobial insole fights odors after long days and hard miles. A cushioned foam sole provides support and control, while a rubber outsole means these runners will go as long as you do.

Name: Stride Sock
Description:
Keep those piggies warm and snug in the Stride Sock, a comfortable merino wool ankle sock that keeps up with you all day!

Double-banded elastic stitching keeps the sock in place to avoid slipping down into the shoe, while the reinforced toe provides protection from pavement-pounding. Odor-resistant fabric technology is woven in with the wool for a sock that won’t let you or your nose down when you take off your shoes after the run. So strong they’re going to last you years, but so comfortable you’re going to want to buy several pairs.

Name: Stride Cap
Description:
Keep your hair - and the sun - out of your face as you run with the Stride Cap, a running hat that’s as light as it is stylish.

Designed to be performant in the marathon miles but casually elegant in-between workouts, the Stride Cap is constructed from a breathable polyester what is lightweight and quick-drying. A soft brim keeps the harsh rays of the run or the driving rain off your face, while being gentle on your forehead, and an adjustable strap on the back allows for custom-fit and feel. Best of all, it is 100% machine-washable, so you can keep it looking as fresh as the day you got it for many miles down the road.

Name: Stride Run Belt
Description:
A must-have accessory for any active people who need a place to put their things when putting in the miles, the Stride Run Belt provides security and convenience in a light and comfortable package.

Available in different colours, the Stride Run Belt is sleek and non-bulky, lending itself to long runs without shifting out of place or bounding around, even when loaded up. Big enough to hold a large phone, wallet, keys, and even sunscreen bottles, it still sits snugly enough to the waist to not add extra heft. Constructed from washable polyester, the Stride Run Belt can be worn in any weather and still provide waterproof protection to your belongings. An adjustable strap for custom fit, and a reinforced zipper make this an all-time classic you won’t wan to leave home without.

Name: Stride Run Gloves
Description:
On those cool, crisp mornings, when your core is warm but your extremities are numb, you’ll be reaching for the Stride Run Gloves like a mug of hot cocoa!

With woven cuffs to prevent rain and snow from getting in, and traction pads on the fingers to help you maintain your grip in all conditions, these lightweight and breathable gloves keep your hands cozy but feel like there’s nothing there at all. Made from a polyester and merino wool blend, they are soft to the touch but durable enough to use without hesitation when tying laces, reaching for water bottles, or high-fiving your fellow runners. Pads on the fingers add not just traction, but also compatibility with touchscreens, so you can adjust your watch or answer the phone without removing them. Available in several striking colors, you’ll want a pair for each running jacket so you’re never caught without them!

Name: Revive Sock
Description:
When the dogs are barking and you need to let them rest, put them them in Revive Sock to calm them down!

The Revive Sock is a merino wool sock with compression that encourages blood circulation back to the core and initiates healing between workouts. A soft fabric with deep cushioning, this sock provides just enough warmth and comfort to pamper your feet, even when you still need to be moving around the house, gym, studio or streets. Added midsole support means the bridges of your feet won’t be left doing all the work, and a variety of fun colors allows you to show your personality while you recover. Double elastic around the ankles prevents slipping and shifting, and inside-out stitching on the toes prevents irritation when you’re needing comfort.

Name: Revive Slide
Description:
You ask a lot of your feet, so when they ask for a break, give them the ultimate in recovery with the Revive Slide.

Made of a soft-yet-versatile foam, the Revive Slide is a flip flop sandal that hugs your foot for immediate relief and recovery following hard workouts and long runs. An oversized sole with a flexible pivot point makes walking feel like a massage while protecting the muscles around the ankle and arch. Entirely washable, these slides are meant for wear inside and outside, with a strong rubber outsole to provide traction and durability no matter where they’re worn.

Name: Revive Beanie
Description:
For those days when you need to keep your head cozy, you’ll love the Revive Beanie.

Soft and plush, this wool hat sits low over the ears to provide relief from wintery winds, or can perch up higher for minimal protection when the sun is shining. Anti-static technology keeps longer hair from sticking, while a comfortable elastic layer provides a snug fit without the unwanted pressure of lesser-quality material. Available in many fun colors, the Revive Beanie is as home in the studio as it is on the streets, yet so comfortable it’s like pyjamas for your head!

Name: Revive Bottle
Description:
No recovery can be complete without hydration, and for the ultimate in style and function, the Revive Bottle is here.

Made from a strong and dishwasher-safe non-BPA plastic, the Revive Bottle features an ergonomic grip patten, anti-slip mat, and an integrated cold-pack to keep your post-workout beverage refreshingly cool! The spout is secure when closed to prevent spills, but opens smoothly when you need a sip, so you’re never tasked with biting down to yank open a stubborn water bottle again. With a 20 ounce capacity, it holds enough water to keep you going without having to return to the tap, but remains light enough to handle with ease.

Name: Apex Bottle
Description:
For hydration-on-the-go, the Apex Bottle is second to none.

A squeezable, stylish, and secure outer shell forms to your hand while the thermal insert keeps beverages cool or hot to your taste for hours. The non-BPA plastic is dishwasher-safe and available in a variety of colors to suit your look. The metal threaded lid makes for a strong connection to the bottle to prevent spillage, but releases easily for cleaning and storage.

Name: Apex Headband
Description:
For all-season comfort and hair management, the Apex Headband will be your go-to.

A soft-yet-durably polyester-cotton blend is woven with elastic to provide a snug fit that won’t slip off your head while you move, but isn’t so tight that it will cause discomfort, even when worn for long days on the trail or in the gym. A reflective strip along the outside provides added visibility for low-light situations, and it’s machine-washable fabric means you don’t have to worry about sweating in it. Suitable for any weather, this headband can keep hair, rain, snow, sweat, or bad vibes away from your face as you push past your limits.

A soft-yet-durably polyester-cotton blend is woven with elastic to provide a snug fit that won’t slip off your head while you move, but isn’t so tight that it will cause discomfort, even when worn for long days on the trail or in the gym. A reflective strip along the outside provides added visibility for low-light situations, and it’s machine-washable fabric means you don’t have to worry about sweating in it. Suitable for any weather, this headband can keep hair, rain, snow, sweat, or bad vibes away from your face as you push past your limits.

Name: Align Yoga Mat
Description:
When you’re stretching those joints to the limit, you need a mat that’s got your back. That’s where the Align Yoga Mat shines.

With a core constructed from memory foam with an odor-resistant outer layer, this mat gives the perfect mix of comfort and durability needed to support those long, intense yoga sessions. Washable and flexible this mat goes with you whether you’re in the Bikram studio or working on your Warrior by the beach. It also lies flat after being curled up, so you don’t have to deal with those pesky dog-earned edges when in the downward dog. Comes with an adjustable carrying strap for easy mobility.

Name: Align Duffel
Description:
A durable, sturdy, and good looking way to haul your gear from place to place, the Align Duffel is made your style.

A canvas-inspired polyester blend with abrasion-resistance makes up the shell of this go-anywhere bag, and webbing straps keep a strong hold so there’s no risk of rips, tears, or other stuff-threatening events while you’re between stops. An oversized reinforced zipper keeps everything tucked away, and a waterproof lining makes sure it stays safe even on rainy days. A leather handle finishes the look for a stylish-yet-rugged pack that will last longer than you’ll ever expect.

Name: Align Bottle
Description:
Stretch, rest, hydrate, repeat. The Align Bottle will become part of your regular routine in no time.

Non-BPA, dishwasher-safe, and utterly stylish, the Align Bottle sits comfortably on the floor beside your workout station or yoga mat, it’s wide base preventing unintentional knocks and spills. And even if it takes a tumble, the precision-fit lid and mouthpiece work together to hold in liquids so nothing escapes - until you want a sip, which is when the spring-loaded mouthpiece opens easily to deliver your beverage and quench your thirst. The squeezable core is durable and allows for quick delivery when you need a splash, and holds its shape when just a sip is wanted.

Name: Elevation Cap
Description:
A hearty but comfortable baseball-style hat that keep you protected on the trail and looking great off of it!

The Elevation Cap was born out of a need for a better trail hat - one that wears as easily as a running hat but with the durability of a hiking hat. The 100% polyester shell is coupled with a flexible and comfortable elastic rim that makes all-day wear not just possible but even pleasurable. A sturdy brim will keep rain, sun, and forest flora out of your face when you’re chewing up the trails. Machine-washable and easy-to-pack, you’ll want to take this with you everywhere you go.

Name: Elevation Hiker
Description:
Meet the Elevation Hiker - a trail shoe that provides the stability of a hiking boot with the performance of a trail runner.

Starting with a waterproof GORE-TEX™ upper, the shoe hugs the sides of the foot without squeezing it (and works beautifully with the Elevation Trail Sock). Kevlar holds the laces in place and protects the top of the foot from rocks and stumps. Mated to a vulcanized rubber sole with foam inserts, the shoe wears like a boot when on uneven ground but remains light and comfortable when on the flats. When it comes to the Elevation Hiker, if the shoe fits - wear it!

Name: Elevation Trail Sock
Description:
We love the outdoors, but even the most dedicated nature-lover can find themselves sour when they have wet or clammy feet. That is why we created the Elevation Trail Sock.

Both breathable and water-resistant, the proprietary sweat-wicking material deters moisture from gathering on the feet, while keeping air moving around them to keep things fresh and comfortable. Built to pair perfectly with the Elevation Hiker, the Trail Sock also has a reinforced heel and toe cap to reduce wear-and-tear. When the day is done, it is remarkably simple to clean, often only requiring a quick-rinse in a creek and an air dry before they’re ready to track right along with you the next day.

Name: Elevation Gloves
Description:
Cold hands can ruin a great hike. The Elevation Gloves will make sure that’s never an issue for you again.

Our solution to the problem begins with a fabric made using GORE-TEX™ that prevents moisture from sitting against the skin, the cause of most heat loss. From there, a double-elastic wrist band keeps moisture out from the arm, without restricting circulation to the hand. Recognizing that you may need to use your smart watch or phone while on the trail, we’ve also integrated touch-sensitive fingerprints into the glove to ensure you don’t have to take them off just to answer a call or set a new route. Available in several stylish colors.

Name: Momentum Yoga Mat
Description:
Your equipment should help you maintain your momentum, not kill it. The Momentum Yoga Mat is made to go with you, wherever you need it.

Lightweight and durable, the Momentum Yoga Mat has been developed to withstand the rough conditions for non-studio use, such as on gravel, grass, sand, and rock. Ideal for not just Yoga but also pre- and post-race stretching, this foam core, rubber mat protects you from the moisture and rough edges of the ground, keeping you focused on your joints instead of irritations. Once you’re done, it can be easily shaken off and rolled back up with the included adjustable strap to be thrown on your back or in a car trunk as needed. An instant classic!

Name: Momentum Sock
Description:
A typical cross-trainer sock with atypical comfort and longevity, the Momentum Sock will become a new favorite in no time.

With a polyester-Merino wool blend, this sock provides warmth and comfort without the bulk, fitting easily inside of running shoes or recovery slides as needed. The low-ankle height allows the lower leg to breathe, and the reinforced heel and toe boxes resist wear through long runs and intense workouts. Odor-resistant technology keeps unpleasant smells from accumulating, and the elastic ankle band hold the sock in place so you’re not left correcting slippage in the middle of your workout!

Name: Momentum Trainer
Description:
This classic cross-trainer is the perfect blend of comfort and style. When you’re heading out the door without knowing what’s coming next, the Momentum Trainer will be your go-to.

Constructed from a breathable and waterproof upper, the Momentum Trainer also features a soft foam core sole with rubberized toe and heel with a 4mm drop, providing supreme support and performance. Easy-lock laces stay tied so you’re not left reaching down to your toes while on a run, and the colors work with all styles for casual wear once the work is done. While soft, it’s also very durable, allowing for all sorts of flexibility without that unwanted “sole cracking” typical of well-loved cross trainers. Name: Elevation Button-Up Shirt
Description: Versatile layering meets refined style with this button-up shirt, engineered for the modern adventurer. Crafted from breathable, durable fabric, it transitions seamlessly from trail to town—perfect for layering on cooler hikes, warming up by the campfire, or elevating your everyday athleisure look. The relaxed fit allows unrestricted movement, while thoughtful construction ensures it holds up to outdoor demands without sacrificing comfort. Whether you're exploring backcountry or unwinding at base camp, this shirt delivers the performance and aesthetic your active lifestyle deserves.
